title: scrophularia granitica
intro: Scrophularia granitica, also known as mountain figwort, is a plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Scrophularia granitica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
